| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek,

President Trump is one of Corey Stewart's biggest supporters. Corey worked for Trump's campaign in 2016, and Trump sent a tweet congratulating Corey (and attacking Tim) right after the GOP primary election.

**Now, Corey says Trump is going to come to Virginia to campaign against Tim. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: There is dignity in work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Today we celebrate and honor the dedicated working men and women who made America the prosperous country we are today. Protecting workers' rights isn't a battle that's behind us -- _not by a long shot._ We have to change that, **because if you love this country, you fight like hell for the people who make it work.** And I mean all workers -- whether he punches a clock or she works in a diner. Whether they work behind a desk or on a factory floor or in an operating room. That's why, Peter, I was honored to attend the Lorain County Organized Labor's Annual Labor Day Celebration. | [](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff62/4462dc26/6790f731/20064960/1729896792/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180903?refcode=sbe180903_m")
---
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff62/4462dc26/6790f731/20064960/1729896792/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180903?refcode=sbe180903_m")
---
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff62/4462dc26/6790f731/20064960/1729896792/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180903?refcode=sbe180903_m")
---
And today, it was great to spend time with so many people at the Labor Day parade in Cleveland.
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff62/4462dc26/6790f731/20064960/1729896792/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180903?refcode=sbe180903_m")
---
[](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff62/4462dc26/6790f731/20064960/1729896792/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180903?refcode=sbe180903_m")
---
**I was proud to join the Democratic ticket and labor allies around Ohio this weekend, and I'm looking forward to hearing from you: What did you do this weekend to celebrate Labor Day?** (To ensure I'm able to see your response, reply _directly_ to this email!)
This weekend was a powerful reminder of the work that needs to be done for American workers. The critical work that needs to be done so that anyone -- regardless of their zip code or economic status -- has the opportunity to succeed.
While I'm in the Senate, workers in Ohio and all over the country have an unapologetic and outspoken champion. I hope you'll continue fighting with me to make sure I can continue to represent you in 2018.
Happy Labor Day,
Sherrod
_" No work is insignificant. All labor that uplifts humanity has dignity and importance."
\-- Martin Luther King Jr._

#
# _The Case for Confirming Kavanaugh_
“President Trump believes, as I do, that judges must ensure our government does not take actions that violate individual constitutional rights,” Arkansas Attorney General Leslie Rutledge writes in the _Arkansas Democrat Gazette_. “I have no doubt that if confirmed to serve on the Supreme Court, Judge Kavanaugh will continue to use his extensive legal education and experience to protect the Constitution.” [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA0Ljk0NDE2ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNC45NDQxNjg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgxNTU5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.arkansasonline.com/news/2018/sep/02/case-confirming-kavanaugh/) [_**The Wall Street Journal**_](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA0Ljk0NDE2ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNC45NDQxNjg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgxNTU5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.wsj.com/articles/happy-in-their-work-1535756830) Editorial Board writes that “blue-collar workers may be the most optimistic folks in America. Eighty-five percent say they see their lives heading in the right direction,” according to a new Harris Poll. “Seventy percent agree ‘the American Dream is alive for people like me,’ and among those who are parents 88% agree with the statement that ‘my children will have a better future than I will.’” In the _Jewish Telegraphic Agency_ , Special Representative for International Negotiations [**Jason Greenblatt**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA0Ljk0NDE2ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNC45NDQxNjg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgxNTU5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/president-donald-j-trump-wants-new-year-shalom-salaam-peace/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr) writes that peace for the Middle East is within grasp thanks to President Trump. But Greenblatt adds that Palestinian leadership has refused to engage in peace talks since “President Trump made his bold, courageous and historic decision to recognize the reality that Jerusalem has been and will remain the capital of Israel. The leadership’s unwillingness to engage is disappointing and only hurts the Palestinian people that they claim to serve.” “More prominent figures in the DC area have thrown their weight behind President Trump’s Supreme Court pick Brett Kavanaugh,” Brittany Shepherd reports in the [**_Washingtonian_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA0Ljk0NDE2ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNC45NDQxNjg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgxNTU5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.washingtonian.com/2018/09/03/brett-kavanaugh-washington-jesuit-academy-iacp-write-letters-supporting/). “Senior representatives from Washington Jesuit Academy and the International Association of Chiefs of Police, which is based in Alexandria, wrote to the Senate Judiciary Committee voicing their support of the judge before his highly anticipated confirmation hearings," scheduled to begin today. In [**_The Hill_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA0Ljk0NDE2ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNC45NDQxNjg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgxNTU5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&http://thehill.com/opinion/campaign/404712-something-to-celebrate-this-labor-day-the-state-of-american-jobs-and-workers), Armstrong Williams writes that this Labor Day, the American worker had something to celebrate. “The U.S. unemployment rate as of July was 4.7 percent, the lowest it has been in over thirty years. There are more Americans working today than at any other time in the history of our country, with over 130 million employed.” “President Trump has issued an executive order to strengthen retirement security in America. The order benefits small-business employees seeking easier ways to achieve greater retirement savings,” Secretary of Labor Alexander Acosta writes in [**_The News & Observer_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA0Ljk0NDE2ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNC45NDQxNjg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgxNTU5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/trump-strengthening-u-s-retirement-security-heres/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr). “At a time when President Trump’s tax cuts are returning more money to paychecks, small-business employees need simple and convenient access to workplace plans to save for retirement and to protect their financial health.”

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: As your next CFO
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4BtqOCiZvw7tdaGmM377_ni3fzpklIRSZ9lP-nFdHa8=/JES3GMBWanPlrlWBT94C05MjHtNSMm5HvIZN0hVeYQQ=) Friends and Neighbors -- On the campaign trail, I am often asked: "Why did you decide to get into the race to become Florida's next Chief Financial Officer (CFO)?" There were many reasons - **I want to bring an innovation centered economy to Florida. I want your hard earned tax dollars to be spent in the way you have been promised, repeatedly, that they would be. I want to act as a key check on the Governor 's mansion, the Legislature - and Washington, to include Congress and yes, the White House.** I served 10 years in the Florida Senate, where I successfully fought to protect the pensions of Florida's first responders, educators and public servants. **[As your next CFO, I would:](https://act.myngp.com/el/4BtqOCiZvw7tdaGmM377_ni3fzpklIRSZ9lP-nFdHa8=/jrnAXW25Lcp7HXvdJIil9D8uLJ8jpswYHDqK8OwchA0=)**
* **[Protect Florida's Retirement System ](https://act.myngp.com/el/4BtqOCiZvw7tdaGmM377_ni3fzpklIRSZ9lP-nFdHa8=/jrnAXW25Lcp7HXvdJIil9D8uLJ8jpswYHDqK8OwchA0=)- **One of the main responsibilities of the CFO is protecting the Florida Retirement System (FRS). FRS is widely viewed as the gold-standard among public retirement systems in the United States and I believe that the seniors who have spent their entire adult lives paying into it deserve to feel secure in their twilight years. What's more, I have the experience requisite for the job. For eight of my ten years in the senate, I served as chair of the Committee on Governmental Oversight and Accountability. In this role, I exercised legislative authority over the Florida Pension Fund. I took this work seriously, fighting tooth and nail against all attempts to politicize or chip away at the fund. As CFO, I will continue to advocate for a robust retirement system and to protect the dignity of those depending on it.

* **[Keep Insurance Rates Stable](https://act.myngp.com/el/4BtqOCiZvw7tdaGmM377_ni3fzpklIRSZ9lP-nFdHa8=/jrnAXW25Lcp7HXvdJIil9D8uLJ8jpswYHDqK8OwchA0=) - **With over a thousand miles of coastline, Florida faces serious risks when it comes to flooding, wind and other severe weather events. In order to protect against these risks, I believe that the cost of insurance needs to remain stable over time. Working families build insurance costs into their budgets every month and predictability of rates is essential to keeping checkbooks balanced. As CFO, I will work with insurers to stabilize rates. I'll also investigate and go after those guilty of insurance fraud and other forms of financial malfeasance.

* **[Grow the Innovation Economy](https://act.myngp.com/el/4BtqOCiZvw7tdaGmM377_ni3fzpklIRSZ9lP-nFdHa8=/jrnAXW25Lcp7HXvdJIil9D8uLJ8jpswYHDqK8OwchA0=) - **With a university system ranked among the best in the nation, a thriving business community and an established capital infrastructure system, many of the most crucial pieces necessary to build an innovation economy are already present in Florida. During my ten years in the Florida Senate, I crafted significant bipartisan legislation to establish funds and structures - the Florida Institute of Commercialization, Florida Technology Seed Capital Fund, Florida Opportunity Fund, and the Florida Growth Fund - that have secured capital for start-ups and allowed entrepreneurs to more easily commercialize their research and ideas. The framework for an innovation ecosystem has been mapped out, but there's more work to be done. As a former tech executive and our next CFO, I will continue to grow Florida's innovation economy through smart investment and bold leadership. ** **

[Help Jeremy get to the cabinet. Chip in $20.18.](https://act.myngp.com/el/4BtqOCiZvw7tdaGmM377_ni3fzpklIRSZ9lP-nFdHa8=/vVMUc-PmcaluqDjqUUxXbsRH_Vw2cye_VOvj0UbQRYA=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) As your next CFO, I would also stand up to the insurance companies and fight for lower insurance rates for Floridians. I will work tirelessly every day to help build an innovative, prosperous Florida, with policies and practices that work for every day Floridians, while standing for values and principles we can be proud of and for a forward thinking vision for our great state's future. But I have an election to win first. **And I can 't get there without your help.** **[Can you contribute $20.18 today, to help me bring our vision to the cabinet and to help move Florida forward?](https://act.myngp.com/el/4BtqOCiZvw7tdaGmM377_ni3fzpklIRSZ9lP-nFdHa8=/vVMUc-PmcaluqDjqUUxXbsRH_Vw2cye_VOvj0UbQRYA=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)**** ** Thank you for everything you do, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---

name: Jason Yates
subject: It starts today.
body:
Peter,
Today Judge Brett Kavanaugh’s confirmation hearings begin for the United States Supreme Court.
This appointment will determine the future of religious liberty and protection of the sanctity of life for our children, grandchildren, and generations to come.
We need Senators in Washington D.C. to hear from people of faith loud and clear—to vote the values of WE THE PEOPLE they were elected to represent, not party leadership.
[**Take two minutes for the future of our country** and send a note to your Senators letting them know you support Kavanaugh’s confirmation to the Supreme Court](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=kErcChkhgXyK6emZY6HIjgzUnisRN3F66ADVWMUwgbE&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180904p2a01&n=1).
If you’ve already contacted your Senators, forward this email to your friends and family and encourage them to do the same! It’s critical our voice is heard this week on Capitol Hill.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=kErcChkhgXyK6emZY6HIjgzUnisRN3F66ADVWMUwgbE&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180904p2a01&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO

body:
|
#
Peter -- Shortly after last month’s primary, my campaign emailed a survey to supporters like you about the issues that matter most in this race. I wanted to give you a look at what we found: After traveling across the state to talk with voters at roundtables and brown bag lunches, I’m not surprised to learn that health care ranked as the highest priority issue by far. **Too many hardworking people aren't able to find good, affordable health insurance for their families. Hospitals are shutting down in rural communities. And politicians in Washington are more concerned about scoring political points than actually doing something to help fix it.** Everyone knows our health care system isn’t working for enough people. But when folks here in Tennessee look to Washington to help solve problems, too often they’re only offered more of the same partisan bickering and dysfunction that’s paralyzed Congress. I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I believe we can fix the mess in Washington -- and I’m committed to working with you to get things done for our state and our country. **So I’m asking:** **Can you pitch in $10 to support our campaign to fix Congress? subject: Kavanaugh’s confirmation hearings
body:
Activist -

Confirmation hearings have begun for Judge Kavanaugh’s nomination to the Supreme Court — and this week, I’ll have the chance to ask him tough, pointed questions about his record under oath.

This vacancy on the Supreme Court is one of the consequential fights of the last several years, and I want you to know I am prepared to do everything in my power to stop this nomination.

Kavanaugh is a right-wing ideologue hand picked by special interest groups because of his opposition to Roe v. Wade. He has sided with corporations many times over, is a threat to our civil and voting rights, and he believes a sitting president cannot be indicted for federal crimes.

Furthermore, this hearing has been dangerously rushed. Republicans are blocking the release of documents from Kavanaugh’s time in the White House, and President Trump is preventing the release of 100,00 pages of documents which really begs the question: What are they hiding?

The truth is that Kavanaugh is the least popular nominee to the Supreme Court in decades, and the more the public learns about his record, the less they want him confirmed to the highest court in the land.

Activist, if you’re with me in this fight, can you sign my petition opposing Judge Kavanaugh’s nomination to the Supreme Court? (https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/stop-kavanaugh-dems/?source=ads_dems_180905_all_ad1)

Sign the petition (https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/stop-kavanaugh-dems/?source=ads_dems_180905_all_ad1) Not a single one of us can afford to sit on the sidelines with so many of our hard won civil rights — and the rule of law itself — on the line.

I hope you’ll tune in this week to see me question Kavanaugh. Thanks as always for everything you’ve done, and will do for my team and I.

—Kamala

Sign the petition (https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/stop-kavanaugh-dems/?source=ads_dems_180905_all_ad1)

name: Tina Smith
subject: Kavanaugh hearings begin today, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This Labor Day weekend I spent a good deal of time thinking about this.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ad22/c1f7015/6df6e1f5/1141ffe0/1925353044/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september_scotus?refcode=rtw_20180904_em&recurring=auto") Friend, This Labor Day weekend I spent a good deal of time thinking about the historic confirmation hearings on Judge Kavanaugh, which start today in the United States Senate. These hearings come at a pivotal moment in our country's history. Supreme Court nominees are always important, but this one is especially so, because, if Kavanaugh is confirmed, he will fundamentally shift the Supreme Court away from protecting people's freedoms. This is why I strongly oppose his confirmation. Judge Kavanaugh has ruled _against_ protecting voters from discrimination and _for_ allowing states to make it harder for people to exercise their constitutional right to vote. He has ruled _against_ protecting clean and air water and _for_ big polluters. Kavanaugh was selected because, as the President promised, he would undermine access to legal abortion and the right to privacy outlined in the Roe decision. And we have every reason to believe he would support Trump's goal of allowing insurance companies to discriminate against people who have pre-existing conditions like cancer or diabetes. And Kavanaugh has argued that the President should not be exposed to investigations or required to follow laws he claims are unconstitutional. **In effect, Kavanaugh believes the President should be above the law.** **[I will fight with everything I have to stop his confirmation in the Senate, but I know that means Republicans and special interests are going to spend millions attacking me. That's why I wanted to ask you: Can you pitch in $10 so our campaign can respond to these attacks while I'm taking on Kavanaugh in the Senate?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ad22/c1f7015/6df6e1f5/1141ffe0/1925353044/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september_scotus?refcode=rtw_20180904_em&recurring=auto")** I know enough about the rulings and opinions of Judge Kavanaugh to believe he would be bad for our country, and should not be on the Supreme Court. But it is deeply disturbing to me that the Trump White House has broken with decades of bipartisan tradition by refusing to release over 100,000 pages of Kavanaugh writings. **What are they hiding, and what do they want to keep from the American public?** The United States Supreme Court should be above partisan politics. Supreme Court Justices are charged with protecting the constitutional rights and freedoms of all Americans, not just those with money and power. So as these historic confirmation hearings commence, I hope you will be watching, and asking whether you believe Judge Kavanaugh will protect your rights and freedoms. And if you conclude, as I do, that he will not, I urge you make your voice heard. The Senate has refused to confirm other Judges that would have been bad for our democracy -- like Robert Bork, almost 30 years ago -- but only when the American public made their voices heard. **Please do everything you can to ensure every single Senator in Washington hears you.** Keep fighting and thank you for being a part of this, Tina Smith | **Tina Smith is a fierce progressive running for U.S. Senate in a special election in Minnesota. clean_body: This Labor Day weekend I spent a good deal of time thinking about this. | "" Friend, This Labor Day weekend I spent a good deal of time thinking about the historic confirmation hearings on Judge Kavanaugh, which start today in the United States Senate. These hearings come at a pivotal moment in our country's history. Supreme Court nominees are always important, but this one is especially so, because, if Kavanaugh is confirmed, he will fundamentally shift the Supreme Court away from protecting people's freedoms. This is why I strongly oppose his confirmation. Judge Kavanaugh has ruled against protecting voters from discrimination and for allowing states to make it harder for people to exercise their constitutional right to vote. He has ruled against protecting clean and air water and for big polluters. Kavanaugh was selected because, as the President promised, he would undermine access to legal abortion and the right to privacy outlined in the Roe decision. And we have every reason to believe he would support Trump's goal of allowing insurance companies to discriminate against people who have pre-existing conditions like cancer or diabetes. And Kavanaugh has argued that the President should not be exposed to investigations or required to follow laws he claims are unconstitutional. In effect, Kavanaugh believes the President should be above the law. "" I know enough about the rulings and opinions of Judge Kavanaugh to believe he would be bad for our country, and should not be on the Supreme Court. The political network run by the billionaire Koch brothers announced which districts they will be targeting this fall, and VA-7 made the list.
| | Peter, I hope you had a relaxing Labor Day weekend. Abigail and our team passed out candy at the Powhatan parade (and spent some time with our Lt. Gov., Justin Fairfax!). Sometimes, reporters refer to Labor Day as the unofficial start of campaign season. Of course, we have been campaigning all summer -- but it's true that we are getting even busier, **because outside groups looking to influence the midterm elections begin to pay closer attention in September.** For example, we received some important news last week: **The political network run by the billionaire Koch brothers announced which districts they will be targeting this fall, and VA-7 made the list.** Peter, the Koch brothers have pledged to spend _hundreds of millions of dollars_ before the November elections, and we will only counteract their influence with robust grassroots support. [**Will you make a donation of any size today to ensure that the Koch brothers do not buy this race?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/E0Si_Ap0kjOMBxWlgWjubzIdYD0NyJAntO2agb4CrDU=/0Jag1-20-eJWMoshdT2whPfU0P_kkRmHpt2gU4ASDSA=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.04_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Now, we are not surprised that the Koch brothers are supporting Rep. Brat this fall. Rep. Brat has frequently supported their extreme agenda, and they are surely intimidated by Abigail's message of positive change. But they are mistaken if they believe they can slow our momentum with their outside money. We have built a competitive campaign in Virginia's 7th district, all without taking a dollar in corporate PAC money, with your grassroots support, and we will take on the Koch brothers the same way. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6355/51dbcc2a/1d3b1881/3a87205/3314183057/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Supreme Court confirmation hearings begin today, team, and I'm going to vote against the President's nominee. Here's why:

President Trump outsourced one of his most solemn responsibilities as president -- giving a lifetime appointment to the highest court in our nation -- to unelected, far-right, corporate special interests. This is a decision that will affect generations of Americans, and because the process was corrupt from the beginning, I won't endorse any part of it.

I know there will be costs to that decision. Special interest groups are attacking Democrats like me for speaking out, and they're spending big to flip our seats in November. **_[I'm ready to fight back, but I need a team of grassroots donors to help match what the far right will spend -- can you chip in $5 today?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180904_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

The special interest groups that picked this nominee champion policies that hurt working families. They want to destroy labor unions, decimate Medicaid and undo the Affordable Care Act's protections for people with pre-existing conditions. If they get their way, corporations will benefit at the expense of the middle class. That's not an option, and I'm going to fight it with both fists up.

Americans deserve better than the President's nominee and the corrupt process that nominated him. **That's why I'm asking for your financial support today as hearings on this nominee begin -- small-dollar donations will give this campaign the resources we need to fight back against special interests' attacks.**

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/fight-back](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180904_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob

Will you make your first donation to help out?

body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Need you to
take a look at what the Dallas Morning News just reported over the
weekend:

A pro-Cruz super PAC is “... poised to pump millions into an ad blitz aimed at
putting the brakes on O'Rourke's momentum, and they're standing by to spend
even more heavily in the final two months...The first volley will start airing
after Labor Day.”

Dallas Morning News | September 1, 2018

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/6795?refcode=em20180904&t=1019&akid=7226%2E444211%2EfL3j7X ]Can you pitch in
$3
to fund our voter contact efforts so
we can cut through all the noise of these attack ads? We need to get
moving now.

We knew it wouldn’t be long until the special-interest groups and super
PACs flooded the airwaves with negative, misleading ads attacking Beto --
trying to sway this election. But are we just going to let them do this?
It’s pretty obvious why they’re running scared and calling in backup:

They know that Beto has outpaced Cruz -- listened to Texans in each of our
state’s 254 counties -- learning more about the issues that matter to
communities across the state.

They know that we’re building the largest get-out-the-vote operation in
Texas history.

They know that we’ve out-raised Senator Cruz, his PAC and his super PAC
time and again with the power of grassroots contributions -- real people
pitching $5, $10 bucks at a time.

And they know that the polls are tightening -- the latest shows Beto down
just one point from Senator Cruz.

That’s why outside groups are going to spend millions of dollars on these
negative ads, generating a lot of noise and trying to scare Texans about
Beto. But the best way to cut through the noise is to organize on the
ground, talking to voters directly.

attack ads by funding our organizing program -- the largest in Texas
history.

Thanks for being in Beto’s corner. We’re counting on you to step up in a
bigger way than ever before during these final 63 days. We can’t risk
falling short.

Team Beto

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter,

I can't thank you enough for your incredible outpouring of support last week. Now, I have one more thing to ask of you: what top priorities are you taking with you to the ballot box?

With just 63 days left until Election Day, it's important that we know what matters most to you.

**Let us know: What are your top priorities in the final stretch of this election?**

[**Environmental protections**](https://act.myngp.com/el/j2orT3t1hpa8odR-tgDn_c1cbJUxxbbICldx4zG_J4M=/HOdTZ1joLd8sIELPgYRzqd30kh3dCh2M4D_oxVsQpyI=)

Mike

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: RE: Endorsed by Elizabeth Warren
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
I wanted to make sure you saw the email below from Senator Elizabeth Warren. The things she fights for, especially her work with the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, go hand-in-hand with the type of work I’ve done as a paralegal.**It's about the fight for justice and the underdogs.** **[_I’m honored to have Senator Warren supporting our campaign and I hope you’ll join her by making a contribution today!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2095866/10876248/584410110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzIzMDQyYi04OGIwLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Qk2wx6qUyVVDihKmvqSXsPdS-TUMQwMhPKKykVvTio=)**
Standing Tall for All,
J.D. Scholten
\-------------------------------------------------
Peter,
In Congress, I’ve made it a priority to fight for working families across America and to stand up to the big banks, giant corporations, and the lobbyists that have left our working families behind.
This is a fight that must be won, and to win, we’re going to need to put more people in Congress who hold these same values -- people who will stand up for working-class Americans and make it a priority to get big money out of politics.
That’s why **I’m proud to stand with J.D. Scholten** , who is running in Iowa’s 4th District against arguably the most divisive member of Congress in Steve King.
The contrast couldn’t be more clear. King’s biggest lifetime corporate PAC donor is the American Bankers Association -- while J.D. himself isn’t taking a dime in corporate PAC money from anyone.
And yet, J.D. has outraised his opponent thanks to contributions from more than 13,000 individual grassroots donors!
J.D. has made getting big money out of politics a focal point of his campaign -- and he isn’t just talking the talk, he’s walking the walk. [**_And that’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting his campaign by chipping in whatever you can today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2095867/10876249/584410110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzIzMDQyYi04OGIwLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Qk2wx6qUyVVDihKmvqSXsPdS-TUMQwMhPKKykVvTio=)
But that’s just part of why this race is so important. **Steve King was just named as one of the 15 “Worst for Women” in Congress** because, among other things, he “blamed the use of contraception for a ‘dying civilization’ and declared U.S. citizens should be increasing birth rates to keep out immigrants.”
J.D.’s campaign motto is “Standing Tall for All” - not because he’s 6’6”, but because he stands for an economy, a government, and a healthcare system that will work for all of the people of his district, and because he’s fighting for a community where racism, sexism, bigotry, and hatred aren’t welcome.
**It is my pleasure to endorse J.D. Scholten in this pivotal race,** and I look forward to the possibility of calling him an ally in Congress.
[**_Please join me in supporting J.D. with a contribution today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2095868/10876250/584410110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzIzMDQyYi04OGIwLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Qk2wx6qUyVVDihKmvqSXsPdS-TUMQwMhPKKykVvTio=)
Thanks for joining me in the fight to “Stand Tall” for J.D.,
Elizabeth
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2095869/10876251/584410110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzIzMDQyYi04OGIwLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Qk2wx6qUyVVDihKmvqSXsPdS-TUMQwMhPKKykVvTio=)

King’s biggest lifetime corporate PAC donor is the American Bankers Association -- while J.D. himself isn’t taking a dime in corporate PAC money from anyone. And yet, J.D. has outraised his opponent thanks to contributions from more than 13,000 individual grassroots donors! J.D. has made getting big money out of politics a focal point of his campaign -- and he isn’t just talking the talk, he’s walking the walk. = But that’s just part of why this race is so important. Steve King was just named as one of the 15 “Worst for Women” in Congress because, among other things, he “blamed the use of contraception for a ‘dying civilization’ and declared U.S. citizens should be increasing birth rates to keep out immigrants.” J.D.’s campaign motto is “Standing Tall for All” - not because he’s 6’6”, but because he stands for an economy, a government, and a healthcare system that will work for all of the people of his district, and because he’s fighting for a community where racism, sexism, bigotry, and hatred aren’t welcome. It is my pleasure to endorse J.D. Scholten in this pivotal race, and I look forward to the possibility of calling him an ally in Congress. = Thanks for joining me in the fight to “Stand Tall” for J.D., Elizabeth = Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee Scholten4Iowa P.O. subject: In photos: Judge Kavanaugh’s remarkable career
body:
| |
---
The White House • September 4, 2018
## In photos: Judge Kavanaugh’s remarkable career
##
##
**Today, Judge Brett Kavanaugh** appeared before the Senate Judiciary Committee for the beginning of his confirmation hearing for the U.S. Supreme Court. Predictably, Democrats attempted to thwart even holding a hearing on the Judge’s nomination, rather than focusing on his record. **It’s easy to see why** : Judge Kavanaugh has a long, clear history as an independent and impartial arbiter of the law. He ruled against the Republican National Committee in one campaign-finance case and in favor of a liberal pro-choice group, Emily’s List, in another. He has ruled in favor of environmentalist plaintiffs in some cases and in favor of Western landowners and coal miners in others. **He bases his rulings on the law** —not politics, policy, or identity. Despite being appointed by a Republican President, Judge Kavanaugh ruled at least 23 times against Bush Administration agencies from 2006 to 2008. As a professional, he has been a leader in promoting racial equality and advancing minorities in the workplace, writing an important law review article about ending racial discrimination in jury selection. **The Judge’s critics** know all of this, which is why they’re talking about politics instead of Judge Kavanaugh’s credentials. But by the end of this week’s testimony, Americans will know the real story of his exceptional career in public service. [**A remarkable career in photos: Judge Kavanaugh testifies before the Senate.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA0Ljk0NDQ4NTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNC45NDQ0ODUwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgxODYxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/remarkable-career-photos-judge-kavanaugh-testify-senate/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Get the facts** : [**Judge Kavanaugh is among the most qualified nominees in history.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA0Ljk0NDQ4NTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNC45NDQ0ODUwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgxODYxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/judge-brett-m-kavanaugh-exceptionally-qualified-deserving-nominee-supreme-court/?utm_source=twitter&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=wh)
## In their words: ‘A faithful servant’
##
**Senators from both parties** told the White House they wanted to see a real judge nominated with outstanding credentials—one who will respect precedent. Judge Kavanaugh is all of that and more. **That much is evident** from the broad support he has received from every corner of American life he has touched. Letters of support have poured into the Senate from Judge Kavanaugh’s **[former law clerks](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA0Ljk0NDQ4NTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNC45NDQ0ODUwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgxODYxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/wp-content/uploads/2018/09/2018-07-09-Kavanaugh-Clerk-Support-Letter-FINAL.pdf?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) , [parents from his daughter’s youth basketball team](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA0Ljk0NDQ4NTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNC45NDQ0ODUwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgxODYxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/wp-content/uploads/2018/09/2018-08-10-Kavanaugh-Basketball-Parents-Letter-FINAL.pdf?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d), [legal scholars](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA0Ljk0NDQ4NTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNC45NDQ0ODUwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgxODYxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/wp-content/uploads/2018/09/2018-08-28-Kavanaugh-Legal-Academic-Letter-FINAL.pdf?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)**, and many more groups and individuals.**** **“Judge Kavanaugh is an outstanding jurist** with a proven commitment to upholding the Constitution and the rule of law,”****[**a majority of America’s state Attorneys General**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA0Ljk0NDQ4NTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNC45NDQ0ODUwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgxODYxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/wp-content/uploads/2018/07/Letter-from-Attorneys-General.pdf?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)**** clean_body: | | The White House • September 4, 2018 In photos: Judge Kavanaugh’s remarkable career Today, Judge Brett Kavanaugh appeared before the Senate Judiciary Committee for the beginning of his confirmation hearing for the U.S. Supreme Court. Predictably, Democrats attempted to thwart even holding a hearing on the Judge’s nomination, rather than focusing on his record. It’s easy to see why : Judge Kavanaugh has a long, clear history as an independent and impartial arbiter of the law. He ruled against the Republican National Committee in one campaign-finance case and in favor of a liberal pro-choice group, Emily’s List, in another. He has ruled in favor of environmentalist plaintiffs in some cases and in favor of Western landowners and coal miners in others. He bases his rulings on the law —not politics, policy, or identity. Despite being appointed by a Republican President, Judge Kavanaugh ruled at least 23 times against Bush Administration agencies from 2006 to 2008. As a professional, he has been a leader in promoting racial equality and advancing minorities in the workplace, writing an important law review article about ending racial discrimination in jury selection. The Judge’s critics know all of this, which is why they’re talking about politics instead of Judge Kavanaugh’s credentials. But by the end of this week’s testimony, Americans will know the real story of his exceptional career in public service. Get the facts : In their words: ‘A faithful servant’ Senators from both parties told the White House they wanted to see a real judge nominated with outstanding credentials—one who will respect precedent. Judge Kavanaugh is all of that and more. That much is evident from the broad support he has received from every corner of American life he has touched. Letters of support have poured into the Senate from Judge Kavanaugh’s , , , and many more groups and individuals.** “Judge Kavanaugh is an outstanding jurist with a proven commitment to upholding the Constitution and the rule of law,” write. “We have no doubt that he possesses the qualifications, temperament, and judicial philosophy to be an excellent Associate Justice.” Photo of the Day Brett M. Kavanaugh is sworn in to the D.C. Circuit Court by Justice Anthony Kennedy** | | The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

Team,
Celebrating Labor Day weekend got us thinking about what it really takes for a working person to get ahead and build a future in our community--and all the ways having Tom McClintock as our representative makes that more difficult.
**McClintock has consistently voted to put profits before people** --most blatantly by voting for a tax bill that benefits special interests while raising taxes on ordinary Americans.
McClintock pretends that votes like this will help families get ahead--but something that would really help is (for starters) increasing access to affordable community college and vocational and technical training programs. These programs support local jobs and set students up for the careers of tomorrow without leaving them drowning in debt.
But instead of ensuring there are opportunities in Calaveras County for job training partnerships and other programs that help build the workforce our local businesses need, McClintock voted for a tax plan that prioritizes wealthy special interests over our middle-class families.
**Tom McClintock 's priorities are wrong for our district. We need to invest in our workforce and we need to elect a representative who'll commit to those investments--that's Jessica. If you agree, add your name with one click now:**

Hello,

We knew that with the millions pouring into our opponent's campaign from special-interest groups, we'd need to ask a lot from supporters like you.

But thanks to Nevadans across the state, we were able to exceed our end-of-month fundraising goal and launch our latest TV ad about my plan to create new, good-paying jobs for Nevadans.

I can't thank you enough, and wanted to make sure you were one of the first to see our new ad.

**[I'm really proud of this ad, telling my father's story and sharing my plans for Nevada. Will you check it out and then chip in whatever you can afford to help us keep it up on the air? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/FYSZxUBRMIfMQ5OpqjtH3clhalcre2sEmav0inJ0beA=/v4_mJyCcFFnPjMx-eJZ-DA8YG9tyuZC6sh0xqg6UY2E=?gpsid=37_57_3369&refcode=em18_180904_ADdig_L1_fnd_gq_nopn__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180904_ADdig_L1_fnd_gq_nopn__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)**

[WATCH THE AD](https://act.myngp.com/el/FYSZxUBRMIfMQ5OpqjtH3clhalcre2sEmav0inJ0beA=/v4_mJyCcFFnPjMx-eJZ-DA8YG9tyuZC6sh0xqg6UY2E=?gpsid=37_57_3369&refcode=em18_180904_ADdig_B1_fnd_gq_nopn__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180904_ADdig_B1_fnd_gq_nopn__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)

body:

We've raised $1,091,179.57 since our last filing deadline, with an average contribution of $42. **That's what grassroots organizing is all about.** _On the other hand_ , Larry Hogan's average campaign contribution is nearly $400, with 35% of his donations coming from corporate interests. **That's what a campaign of wealthy special interests is all about.** | Thanks to contributions from folks like you, we've been able to do a whole lot -- here's what's happening on the ground:

name: Amy
subject: not normal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
I just left today's hearing on Judge Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court.
On its face, this may look like a normal confirmation hearing. It has all the trappings. All of the senators sitting there. All of the cameras. The statements. The questions. All of it looks normal.
**But let me be clear: This confirmation hearing is not normal.**
Rushing to make a lifetime appointment to the highest court in the land is not normal.
Getting 42,000 documents in the dark of night -- just hours before the hearing starts -- is not normal.
Asserting executive privilege to prevent a thorough review of Judge Kavanaugh's work in the White House is not normal.
And as a former County Attorney, I know that you don't go to court with only seven percent of the key documents, which is another reason why this hearing is not normal.
**My job is to conduct a thorough review of this nominee. Abdicating the role of the Senate is a disservice to the American people.**
We are at a crossroads in our nation's history where we must make a choice: Are we going to dedicate ourselves to improving our democracy and improving our justice system, or not?
The question we must ask this judge is if he will apply equal justice to all citizens -- regardless of whether they live in a poor neighborhood or a rich one, in a small house or the White House.
Our country needs a Supreme Court justice who will better our legal system -- a justice who will serve as a check and balance against the other branches, who will stand up for the rule of law without consideration of politics or partisanship, who will uphold our Constitution without fear or favor, and who will work for the betterment of the great American experiment of democracy.
Together, we will stand up for what is right -- because this is not normal. The American people deserve better.
Thanks,
Amy

body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6358/51dbcc2a/1d28df22/3a86e51/2743302118/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team:

This weekend I was proud to stand behind Bob as we celebrated the working men and women of Pennsylvania. At a time where workers' rights are under attack, it's never been more important to stand with and fight for workers both here at home and across the country.

We celebrated our workers yesterday, and we can't forget about them now that Labor Day is over. The Supreme Court's recent decision in _Janus_ was a huge blow to labor unions across the country, and if corporate special interests succeed in getting the President's Supreme Court nominee confirmed, basic workers' rights will be on chopping block. Meanwhile, the GOP is doing everything they can to end Medicare and Medicaid as we know it -- programs that workers have paid into and deserve to benefit from. Bob fights for workers with both fists up. He is a firewall against the most dangerous pieces of the President's agenda, and we cannot afford to lose his vote for working men and women in the Senate.

**Today I'm asking you to pick one thing you'll do to help send Bob back to the Senate this year. He can't win without you, so show your support today:** [REGISTER TO VOTE](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6358/51dbcc2a/1d28df22/3a86e52/2743302118/VEsE/ "https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/Pages/VoterRegistrationApplication.aspx")
[VOLUNTEER](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/volunteer-2018?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&phone=&refcode=em_20180904_fr2_pa_rem&source=em_20180904_fr2_pa_remups")
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180904_fr2_pa_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") There's too much on the line to sit this election out. Thanks for making a commitment to help re-elect Bob today.

In solidarity,

Jason
